MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry Dorfman; Clerk: M. Goodman; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Conard House, Inc., is present. Represented by Ken Bounthavy
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kristofe Nelson is present.
Attorney Nathanael Player appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem A. Hartsough, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Sep. 16, 2013 remains on calendar. (D501/JPT)
